segments.text: Save me, O God, by your name; vindicate me by your might.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hear my prayer, O God; listen to the words of my mouth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Arrogant foes are attacking me; ruthless people are trying to kill me— people without regard for God.
Surely God is my help; the Lord is the one who sustains me.
Let evil recoil on those who slander me; in your faithfulness destroy them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will sacrifice a freewill offering to you; I will praise your name, Lord, for it is good.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have delivered me from all my troubles, and my eyes have looked in triumph on my foes.
